'''âw-b-k-d''' ('''kawabkedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turtle|turtle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turtle|turtle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-b-k-d
|-
! Lemma
| kawabkedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwabkedoko|thiwabkedoko]] || [[word:jiwabkedoko|jiwabkedoko]] || [[word:shiwabkedoko|shiwabkedoko]] || [[word:kiwabkedoko|kiwabkedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwabkedoko|thuthuwabkedoko]] || [[word:jujuwabkedoko|jujuwabkedoko]] || [[word:shushuwabkedoko|shushuwabkedoko]] || [[word:kukuwabkedoko|kukuwabkedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwabkedoko|thuwabkedoko]] || [[word:juwabkedoko|juwabkedoko]] || [[word:shuwabkedoko|shuwabkedoko]] || [[word:kuwabkedoko|kuwabkedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowabkedoko|thothowabkedoko]] || [[word:jojowabkedoko|jojowabkedoko]] || [[word:shoshowabkedoko|shoshowabkedoko]] || [[word:kokowabkedoko|kokowabkedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowabkedoko|thowabkedoko]] || [[word:jowabkedoko|jowabkedoko]] || [[word:showabkedoko|showabkedoko]] || [[word:kowabkedoko|kowabkedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwabkedoko|thĂŠwabkedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwabkedoko|jĂŠwabkedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwabkedoko|shĂŠwabkedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwabkedoko|kĂŠwabkedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawabkedoko|thawabkedoko]] || [[word:jawabkedoko|jawabkedoko]] || [[word:shawabkedoko|shawabkedoko]] || [[word:kawabkedoko|kawabkedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
